context: Tests whether the agent correctly structures the currency configuration registry with the right metadata fields and values, and implements locale-aware price formatting using the Intl API rather than manual string construction.

checklist.name: SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES exported
checklist.description: The file exports a SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES object (not just a local variable)

checklist.name: All 7 currencies present
checklist.description: SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES contains entries for all of: USD, EUR, GBP, CAD, AUD, JPY, BRL

checklist.name: decimalDigits field present
checklist.description: Each currency entry includes a decimalDigits field

checklist.name: JPY zero decimals
checklist.description: JPY entry has decimalDigits set to 0 (not 2)

checklist.name: EUR symbolFirst false
checklist.description: EUR entry has symbolFirst set to false

checklist.name: CAD/AUD label field
checklist.description: CAD entry includes a label field (e.g. 'CA$') and AUD entry includes a label field (e.g. 'AU$') to disambiguate from plain '$'

checklist.name: BASE_CURRENCY is USD
checklist.description: A BASE_CURRENCY constant is exported and its value is 'USD'

checklist.name: Intl.NumberFormat used
checklist.description: The formatPrice function uses Intl.NumberFormat (not manual string concatenation) to format the amount

checklist.name: style: currency option
checklist.description: Intl.NumberFormat is called with style: 'currency' option

checklist.name: Fraction digits from config
checklist.description: Both minimumFractionDigits and maximumFractionDigits are set from the currency's decimalDigits config value

checklist.name: Fallback handling
checklist.description: formatPrice includes a try/catch (or equivalent) with a fallback string that uses label ?? symbol plus amount.toFixed(decimalDigits) for unsupported environments

checklist.name: Locale parameter used
checklist.description: formatPrice accepts and passes a locale parameter to Intl.NumberFormat (defaults to 'en-US' when not provided)
